scripts.build: node scripts/check-css-syntax.mjs src/styles.css && node scripts/check-z-index-tokens.mjs src/styles.css && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.check:css: node scripts/check-css-syntax.mjs src/styles.css && node scripts/check-z-index-tokens.mjs src/styles.css
scripts.test: tsx src/__tests__/math-golden.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/text-size.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/provider-model-refresh.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/goal-draft-mode.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/workspace-layout.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/tool-approval-mode.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/send-failed.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/message-selection-copy.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/attachment-display.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/command-palette-css.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/context-panel-breakdown.test.ts
scripts.test:all: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsx src/__tests__/math-golden.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/text-size.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/provider-model-refresh.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/goal-draft-mode.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/workspace-layout.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/tool-approval-mode.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/send-failed.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/message-selection-copy.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/attachment-display.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/command-palette-css.test.ts && tsx src/__tests__/context-panel-breakdown.test.ts
